node.text: John will be waiting for James to return from his trip and expressed excitement about a souvenir.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 16 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John asked James about the countries he will be visiting on his trip.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 16 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John feels a mix of determination, passion, overwhelm, and stress while balancing personal and professional life.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 16 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John sent the collected money to a dog shelter near his home.
John assures James of his support and cooperation in their endeavors.
John is interested in James' inspiration behind creating his game, mentioning The Witcher 3.
This experience gave John a clearer sense of purpose and motivated him to potentially pursue a career in the non-profit sector.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 11 (Score: 0.56)

node.text: John used some of the remaining money to buy groceries and cook food for the homeless.
John volunteered his programming skills for a social cause, creating a software tool for a charitable foundation to streamline their operations.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 11 (Score: 0.56)

node.text: John was inspired by the foundation's passion for helping children and used his coding skills to contribute and challenge himself.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 11 (Score: 0.56)
